utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Each one is fully detailed: property has type, price, size, bedrooms, and location; financing has method, down payment, interest rate, term, and fees; legal_services includes service name, cost, and currency; moving_services includes level, cost, currency, and packing inclusion; setup_services specifies type, cost, currency, and included utilities; total_budget lists all cost components and totals. Therefore, every required item is present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution describes a purchase property priced at CAD 950,000, detached house of 200 sqm, 4 bedrooms. In the ground truth, the only property matching this price and similar features (200 sqm, family suitable) is 'Waterfront Property', which has a price of CAD 950K and rating 2. The financing section specifies a mortgage with 5% interest, 25-year term, and a processing fee of 1200 CAD, which corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option with an arrangement fee of 1200 CAD and rating 9. The legal services chosen are 'Premium Legal Package', which has a rating of 9. The moving service is 'Standard Moving' with a cost of 650 CAD, rating 8. The utility setup selected is 'Premium Utilities' (cost 280 CAD), rating 9. A structural survey cost of 650 CAD is included, which matches 'Full Structural Survey' with rating 9.
